title: selaginella corrugis
intro: Selaginella corrugis, also known as the corrugated spike moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is a small, evergreen plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella corrugis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Selaginella corrugis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
